Title: Increases the distribution of revenue from extending the authorization for the hotel and motel taxes in Suffolk county
Summary: Increases the distribution of revenue from extending the authorization for the hotel and motel taxes in Suffolk county; provides for the support of a not-for-profit organization that manages and owns the first lighthouse built in New York, a national register of historic places site in Suffolk county that has been named a national historic landmark and is a New York state historic site.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the tax law, in relation to increasing and providing for the distribution of the revenue from extending the authorization for the hotel and motel taxes in Suffolk county
